title: (reopenend) Accessing archived Items in a board via monday API
excerpt: I’m reopening this feature-request that was apparently closed July 20 without any solution so people actually get a chance to actually upvote it. The last time around the issue got auto-closed after 7 days of last reply …

posts.author: keysie (Robert)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m reopening this feature-request that was apparently closed July 20 without any solution so people actually get a chance to actually upvote it. The last time around the issue got auto-closed after 7 days of last reply (?!).

Accessing archived Items in a board via monday API Feature Requests - API and Apps Framework
I am looking for accessing archived items from an active board (not archived board) via Monday API (not via UI). How do I do that? I see that on the manual Item has a field called “state” which provides the state of the board. So it is always active in this scenario as I have only archived single item. Any help is greatly appreciated. https://monday.com/developers/v2#queries-section-items

I just checked, and the issue still exists.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @keysie!

Apologies, I have opened this back up for you.

We’re implementing a new workflow in our community and as with any new process, a few hitches are to be expected.

Thanks for bringing it up!
